name: Peach Curd
recipeIngredient: Lemon juice to taste -- about 1 tablespoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar, peach puree, lemon juice, and rosewater.
2. Place over simmering water and stir constantly until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and beat in butter, bit by bit.
4. Strain well and chill.
